Title: LinkedIn Headshot From One Phone Selfie (Identity Locked)
Teaser: Turns a casual front-facing selfie into a hireable corporate LinkedIn headshot — soft Rembrandt key, clean neutral backdrop, real skin texture — with your exact face locked so it still looks like you, not a synthetic stranger.
PromptHint: Attach a clear front-facing selfie, then set the [INDUSTRY/SENIORITY], a [BACKDROP COLOR], and optionally the [ATTIRE].
Prompt: ROLE: You are a corporate headshot photographer who shoots executives and is paid to make people look credible, warm and clearly hireable, working inside GPT-4o / Gemini's native image generator. TASK: Using the attached selfie [SELFIE] as the single source of identity, generate a studio-grade professional LinkedIn HEADSHOT of this exact person. Field and seniority: [INDUSTRY/SENIORITY]. Backdrop: [BACKDROP COLOR]. Attire: [ATTIRE]. THINK FIRST (silently, do not print): where the soft key light sits, the difference between 'AI-perfect' and 'professionally photographed' (micro-asymmetry and real pores sell trust), and which chest-up crop flatters this face. THEN GENERATE: an 85mm f/2 look, three-quarter chest-up crop, soft Rembrandt key at 45 degrees with gentle fill and a subtle hair light, genuine catchlights, relaxed confident half-smile, background softly blurred. CONSTRAINTS: keep the same face, skin tone, hairline, eye color, age and bone structure unmistakably recognizable — do NOT beautify into a different person; preserve visible pores and natural skin texture; BAN waxy or airbrushed skin, over-whitened teeth, a frozen fake smile, warped glasses frames, doll-like symmetry, extra fingers, identity drift. OUTPUT FORMAT: print exactly two labeled blocks and nothing else. 1) GPT-4o / GEMINI PROMPT: one conversational paragraph I can paste straight into the image chat, ending with the literal line 'keep the same face and identity, photo-realistic not illustrated'. 2) MIDJOURNEY V7: one line ordered Subject > Attire > Lighting > Lens, ending exactly with --ar 4:5 --style raw --s 100 --hd.

Title: Reverse-Brief Headshot Director: It Interviews You First
Teaser: Flips the workflow — the model asks you a few targeted questions (purpose, industry, vibe, wardrobe), recommends an answer for each, then writes a fully tailored studio-headshot prompt for GPT-4o, Gemini and Midjourney.
PromptHint: Attach your selfie [SELFIE] and just say go — answer the short questions it asks (or accept its recommended defaults).
Prompt: ROLE: You are a headshot art director who interviews a client before building the perfect professional-headshot prompt, working inside GPT-4o / Gemini. TASK: Using the attached selfie [SELFIE] as the eventual identity source, first interview me, then write a tailored studio-headshot prompt. THINK FIRST (silently, do not print): the four decisions that change a headshot most are purpose, industry/level, mood, and wardrobe/backdrop. PHASE 1 — INTERVIEW: ask me ONE question at a time, in plain language, for each of these in order — (a) where will the headshot be used (LinkedIn, actor, founder press, team page, speaker), (b) industry and seniority, (c) the vibe (approachable, authoritative, creative, trustworthy), (d) wardrobe and backdrop preference. For every question, suggest a recommended answer I can accept by saying 'ok'. Do not move on until I answer or accept. PHASE 2 — BUILD: once you have all four, generate the headshot prompt. CONSTRAINTS for the final image: keep the same face, skin tone, hairline, eye color and age recognizable; an 85mm professional look; soft studio lighting; real skin texture; BAN plastic skin, beautified identity drift, extra fingers, warped glasses. OUTPUT FORMAT for PHASE 2: print exactly two labeled blocks and nothing else. 1) GPT-4o / GEMINI PROMPT: one conversational paragraph built from my answers, ending with the literal line 'keep the same face and identity, photo-realistic not illustrated'. 2) MIDJOURNEY V7: one line ordered Subject > Wardrobe > Lighting > Lens, ending exactly with --ar 4:5 --style raw --s 110 --hd.

Title: Headshot Retoucher: Fix Only What's Wrong, Keep Everything Else
Teaser: A surgical cleanup pass for a headshot you almost like — even the skin tone, tame stray hairs and harsh shadows, brighten the eyes, fix the background — while explicitly preserving your exact face, expression and likeness.
PromptHint: Attach the near-final headshot, then list the 1-4 [FIXES] you want and optionally a [RETOUCH STRENGTH] (subtle / standard).
Prompt: ROLE: You are a high-end portrait retoucher who follows the 'fix only what's broken, never replace the person' rule, working inside GPT-4o / Gemini. TASK: Using the attached headshot [PHOTO] as the single source of identity and composition, perform a surgical retouch addressing only the requested fixes. Fixes to apply: [FIXES]. Retouch strength: [RETOUCH STRENGTH]. THINK FIRST (silently, do not print): identify which named issues are lighting, skin, hair, eyes or background — and change nothing the client did not ask for; restraint is the whole job. THEN GENERATE: apply only the requested corrections — e.g. even skin tone while keeping pores, tame flyaway hairs, soften harsh shadows, brighten and sharpen the eyes naturally, clean or replace the background — at the named strength, keeping the original crop, pose and facial lighting feel intact. CONSTRAINTS: preserve the exact face, skin tone, hairstyle, expression, head angle and identity; keep real skin texture (no plastic smoothing); do NOT reshape features, slim the face, change age, or beautify beyond the named fixes; BAN over-whitened teeth, waxy skin, halo edges, identity drift. OUTPUT FORMAT: print exactly two labeled blocks and nothing else. 1) GPT-4o / GEMINI EDIT PROMPT: one conversational 'apply only these fixes, preserve the same face, expression and composition' instruction ready to paste. 2) MIDJOURNEY V7: one line describing the corrected result ordered Subject > Fixes Applied > Lighting > Backdrop, ending exactly with --ar 4:5 --style raw --s 80 --hd.
